sections.paragraph:
Original: מאס

Transliteration: mâ'as

Phonetic: maw-as'

BDB Definition:

  1. to reject, despise, refuse
    1. (Qal)
      1. to reject, refuse
      2. to despise
    2. (Niphal) to be rejected
  2. (Niphal) to flow, run

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1139,1140

Part(s) of speech:
